name: design-frontend-dev
title: Design frontend
description: Clean agent-only frontend design and UI review skill derived from Impeccable, without CLI, hooks, live mode, install flow, site, or commercial surface.
notes:
## What it does

Impeccable helps agents design, critique, audit, polish, harden, optimize, adapt, clarify, colorize, animate, and improve frontend interfaces. It covers brand sites, landing pages, dashboards, app shells, components, forms, onboarding, empty states, accessibility, responsive behavior, visual hierarchy, UX copy, motion, design systems, and AI-looking UI cleanup.

## Clean Companion edition

This package is derived from `pbakaus/impeccable` under Apache-2.0, based on upstream commit `3590bf9e37c84ecbc92f9c205ce1aebf2185a971` from 2026-06-25. It intentionally removes the upstream CLI, hooks, live browser mode, install flow, site, extension, marketing material, and bundled scripts. It keeps the agent-readable design logic and focused references.

## Usage

Use it directly for frontend design work, or as a dependency for review skills that need stronger frontend judgment. When used inside another skill, the owner skill's safety rules still win.

changes: Remove residual live-mode parameter instructions from layout and typography guidance.
Correct the bundled evaluation skill name.
Package clean agent-only Impeccable edition from pbakaus/impeccable upstream 3.1.0.
Remove CLI, hooks, live mode, install commands, site, extension, scripts, and commercial surface.
Keep Apache-2.0 attribution and selected frontend design, audit, accessibility, responsive, motion, typography, layout, and UX references.

commands.name: Review frontend quality
commands.desc: Audit a UI for accessibility, responsive behavior, design-system drift, UX copy, performance, and AI-looking patterns.

commands.name: Polish a surface
commands.desc: Run a final production-quality pass over spacing, typography, states, copy, contrast, edge cases, and responsive behavior.

commands.name: Shape a feature
commands.desc: Plan UX and UI direction before implementation.
